tests.action: Group A guides (3 discovered-NI pages) — internal links + GSC UI indexing request
tests.expected_effect: At least 2 of 3 pages become indexed within 7-21 days
tests.kpi: URL Inspection coverageState changes from 'Discovered - currently not indexed' to 'Submitted and indexed'
tests.correction_if_fail: Improve guide content quality. Add more internal links from higher-authority pages.

tests.action: Group B unknown pages (4) — sitemap verification + internal links + GSC UI indexing
tests.expected_effect: At least 2 of 4 pages become discovered or indexed within 7-14 days
tests.kpi: URL Inspection coverageState changes from 'URL is unknown to Google' to 'Discovered' or 'Submitted and indexed'
tests.correction_if_fail: Verify pages are truly in sitemap. Check robots.txt. Resubmit sitemap.

tests.action: Group C indexed-invisible (8) — internal links from indexed pages
tests.expected_effect: At least 2 of 8 pages show impressions in GSC API within 14-28 days
tests.correction_if_fail: Pages need content improvement, not just links. Investigate why thin variants rank instead of parents.

tests.action: 40 internal links total across all 15 targets
tests.expected_effect: Crawl depth reduced. Google discovers and crawls target pages faster.
tests.kpi: URL Inspection lastCrawlTime advances for target pages
tests.failure_threshold: No crawl advancement on any target page after 21 days
tests.correction_if_fail: Source pages may not be crawled frequently. Request indexing for source pages via GSC UI.
